title: astragalus khajehensis
intro: Astragalus khajehensis, also known as Khajehi astragalus, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It is a perennial herb native to Iran, and its roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus khajehensis include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and aiding in the prevention of diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. Astragalus khajehensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried roots, capsules, and teas, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
